title: Timeline Column Automation
excerpt: I would love to have the capability to set an automation for the timeline column. Ideally I’d like to be able to set the start date of the timeline based off of trigger such as “status change” or “item created” and then …

posts.author: MAYBTMRW (Gabe)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to have the capability to set an automation for the timeline column. Ideally I’d like to be able to set the start date of the timeline based off of trigger such as “status change” or “item created” and then set the secondary timeline date to a date column like “Deliver by” or “In Hands” date.
